_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Skill in translating a business question into a data query, identifying the correct data sources, joins, filters, and aggregations required to answer the question accurately.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AB domain. AB-S-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-K-004 (SP, cosine: 0.333), RC-T-007 (RC, cosine: 0.332).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.5/10 (raw 0.554). Shared vocabulary: [answer]. DCWF-only terms [information, requests] vs WIDAI-only terms [accurately, aggregations, business, correct, data, filters] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.850 (P=0.873, R=0.828). P exceeds R by 0.045 — the DCWF element's 4 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 25 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Answer requests for information." and "Skill in translating a business question into a data query, identifying the corr" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.354 < STS 0.554 (gap -0.201). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [information, requests] and [accurately, aggregations, business] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.2%. Shared tokens: [answer]. DCWF-only: [information, requests]. WIDAI-only: [accurately, aggregations, business, correct, data, filters].
